title: Plant 1,000 Trees Together
description: Help us reforest devastated areas by planting 1,000 native trees. Every dollar plants a seedling that grows into a carbon-absorbing powerhouse.
impact_statement: Plants one tree seedling in a deforested area

title: Clean Water for Rural Schools
description: Provide clean drinking water to 5 rural schools serving 2,000+ children. $1 gives a child clean water for a month.
impact_statement: Provides clean water for one child for a month

title: Feed the Hungry - Community Kitchen
description: Support our community kitchen that serves 200 meals daily to families in need. Every dollar provides a warm, nutritious meal.
impact_statement: Provides one warm meal to a family in need

title: Books for Every Child
description: Donate books to underprivileged children. Reading opens doors to imagination and opportunity. $1 buys one book.
impact_statement: Buys one book for a child who has none

title: Rescue Shelter for Stray Animals
description: Help us build a no-kill shelter for stray dogs and cats. Every dollar feeds and shelters an animal for a day.
impact_statement: Feeds and shelters one animal for a day

title: Solar Panels for Village Clinic
description: Power a rural health clinic with solar energy so doctors can work after dark. $5 powers the clinic for one day.
impact_statement: Powers the clinic lights for one hour
